steps.title: Identify the sentence's structural role
steps.content: The underlined sentence appears between a simple location statement and a detailed physical description. The key clue is “impelled a closer scrutiny”—this phrase directly links the character's singularity to the need for careful examination. The sentence is transitional, not itself descriptive.

steps.title: Match the role to the choices
steps.content: Choice D correctly identifies what the sentence does: it sets up the detailed character description that follows. The sentence accomplishes this by first announcing why the description is warranted—the observer must scrutinize this singular character closely. The other three incorrectly treat it as elaborating on location, introducing setting, or establishing contrast. That matches choice D — D is correct.
